site.title: Tarbaεt tagraɣlant n uḥezzeb
site.tagline: Seg uḥwaǧ n tuqqna ɣer yisekla aɣelnaw
nav.label: Amezwaru
meta.home.description: IATF yerra-d tiḥwaǧin n tidet n tuqqna ɣer yimḍebbren n tɣellist tilellit.
meta.projects.description: Ẓer-d iswiyen i d-yettunefken sɣur IATF.
meta.propose.description: Suter-as i IATF ad k-d-yefk yiwen n usenfaṛ n tuqqna s web, s yimayl, neɣ s Discord.
meta.governance.description: Ɣeṛ amek IATF iqebbel isenfaren, iqeεεed imḍebbren, yerna yeṭṭef leqdic d awezlan.
meta.join.description: Abrid i wakken ad tettekkiḍ deg IATF: asefk n uḍris, tasuqilt, akayad, neɣ aseḥbiber n usenfaṛ.
meta.accessibility.description: Amek i yebɣa IATF ad yeqqim usmel-a d win izemren ad yettwasemres, d wamek ara d-yessekles yiwen i d-yeqqimen d aɣebbar i useḥbiber.
meta.transparency.description: Imezdaɣ n IATF: tiɣawsiwin, isenfaren, d yisallen imaynuten ttwaḥerzen s umata.
registry.empty.title: Mazal ur d-yeffeɣ ara kra n usenfaṛ
registry.empty.body: IATF la d-yettheggi asebter-is amenzu n usenfaṛ agdud.
proposal.form.title: Azen-d asuter
proposal.form.body: Sekklet afrum-a i d-iteddun ɣer ddaw akken ad d-tazenemt asuter i IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: Yessefk JavaScript akken ad tesqedceḍ afaris-a web. Ma ulac-it, seqdec imayl neɣ Discord deg umkan-is.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Asebter-agi ur yettwasbedd ara deg umḍiq-a. Adlis-a ad yeldi amseqdac-ik n yimayl deg umkan-is.
proposal.form.ready: Asmi ara d-tazneḍ asuter-nni, IATF ad d-yesnulfu asebter n usekcem.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Di leɛnaya-k, ɛeddi deg uḥraz n spam uqbel ad t-tazneḍ.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Aḥezzeb n spam yeffeɣ-d. Ttxil-k ɛawed-d akayad uqbel ad ternuḍ.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Ur tezmireḍ ara ad tesqedceḍ talɣiwt n uḥraz n spam akka tura. Ttxil-k ɛreḍ tikelt-iḍen.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Yewweḍ-d lweqt n uḥraz n spam. Ttxil-k ɛreḍ tikelt-iḍen.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Ma ulac aɣilif, ɛemmed tiferkiwin-nni yettwaḥwaǧen uqbel ad ternuḍ.
proposal.form.success: Tanemmirt. Asuter-nwen yewweḍ-d yerna yettwaḥrez akken ad yettwaεqel.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Ma tεawdeḍ ad tessawleḍ IATF ɣef usuter-a, rnu-d aseɣwen-a ddaw-a.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Yella kra i yeɣlin mi tceyyεeḍ asuter-nni. Ttxil-k ɛreḍ tikelt-iḍen. Ma ikemmel wugur-nni, sseqdaceḍ imayl deg umkan-is.
project.detail.problemTitle: D acu n wugur i d-yefru usenfaṛ-a?
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Asebter s tneglizit tamezwarut, tezmer ad ternuḍ tasuqilt ticki.
footer.label: Aḍebsi n usmel
footer.blurb: Ilaq ad yili yeshel ad yebdu uxeddim n useḥbiber, ad d-yeffeɣ, ad yeqqim yeldi.
footer.source: Tawsit n yilugan n tuqqna: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/). Ahil i d-yesskanayen wid yessexdamen tatiknulujit tamɛawnant.
contact.label: Anagraw n umsawal
translation.label: Talɣa n tsuqilt
translation.source: Tutlayt taglizit d nettat i d tutlayt n usmel n usebter-a.
translation.humanReviewed: Tasuqilt-a i tt-iεawed yiwen umeslay yettmeslayen akken ilaq.
translation.machineAssisted: Tasuqqilt-a tettwaεawen s uselkim yerna mazal ur ttwaεawed ara s lekmal sɣur yiwen n umeslay yettmeslayen akken ilaq.
translation.needsUpdate: Tafsirt-a tettwaḥseb uqbel asnulfu aneggaru n tsuqilt n teglizit yerna ahat teḥwaǧ aseɣti.
